title: Better Enchantments
description: pack provide better vanilla enchantment effects to minecraft
body:
# 简体中文
Minecraft中的附魔大多只能附在对应的工具和装备上，这就导致多词条附魔书很容易被浪费。

是时候扩展附魔书在不同装备和工具上的效果了

# Github
[https://github.com/whwdzg/better-enchantments](https://github.com/whwdzg/better-enchantments)

# MCMOD
[https://www.mcmod.cn/class/22543.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/22543.html)

# 官网
[https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-enchantments.html](https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-enchantments.html)

# Q&A
1. 这个数据包/模组对我的MC有什么更改？

   更好附魔模组/数据包加载后，一些附魔书可以附在原本不可以附魔的工具和装备上，并起到不同效果！
   
2. 那有哪些附魔被更改了?

   你可以在游戏中查看进度树，每种附魔都会点亮对应进度（仅支持简体中文和英语）或官网。

# English
Most enchantments in Minecraft can only enchant on few tools or armor, which may cause wastes when having a enchantment book with mutiple enchantments.

It's time to extent the enchantments effect and make them effect on more tools and armor!

# Github
[https://github.com/whwdzg/better-enchantments](https://github.com/whwdzg/better-enchantments)

# MCMOD
[https://www.mcmod.cn/class/22543.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/22543.html)

# Official Page
[https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-enchantments.html](https://whwdzg.github.io/projects/better-enchantments.html)

# Q&A
1. What does this mod do to my Minecraft?

   Better Enchantments change the enchantment books to have effects on more tools and armor.
   
2. Which enchantments are changed?

   You can check out the advancements in game(only support Chinese and English)& Official page(only chinese)
